Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "BOXINGMANAGER-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Boxing Manager.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $8000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Notes: 1. Line 32 was modified to remove the GOSUB 63855 which removes the "PRESS STOP ON TAPE -- THEN PRESS SPACE" message. 2. As this game is frozen, to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $C037. 3. The screen memory at $C400 was intialised with spaces to have a clear screen on startup.
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
